title: Pack installer BLAKE3 integrity
changes: Added blake3 = '1' to ggen-domain and ggen-cli Cargo.toml
ggen-domain installer.rs: added blake3_dir_hash() helper that hashes all files under a directory deterministically; used in update_lockfile() to populate LockedPack.integrity as 'blake3:<hex>'
ggen-domain installer.rs: exposed installer module in packs/mod.rs; fixed pre-existing _package_name bug
ggen-cli packs.rs: added blake3_dir_hash(), IntegrityError enum, and check_integrity() function; update_lockfile() now computes BLAKE3 hash of the downloaded cache dir
Tests: test_blake3_integrity_pass (round-trip passes), test_blake3_integrity_fail_on_mutation (tampered file returns HashMismatch), test_blake3_dir_hash_round_trip (stable hash, changes on mutation)
